base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of koopa_shell_spin — a character (minion) from 1985 super mario bros. rotates rapidly as shell slides horizontally after being kicked. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 4-frame spinning shell — rotates rapidly as shell slides horizontally after being kicked; deals damage on contact
